# user

**Type Property**

The font is available to all processes for the current user session and will be available in subsequent sessions unless unregistered.

## Declaration

```swift
static var user: CTFontManagerScope { get }
```

## Constants

- **CTFontManagerScope.none**: No scope is defined.
- **CTFontManagerScope.process**: The font is available to the current process for the duration of the process unless directly unregistered.
- **CTFontManagerScope.persistent**: The font is available to all processes for the current user session and will be available in subsequent sessions unless unregistered.
- **CTFontManagerScope.session**: The font is available to the current user session but won’t be available in subsequent sessions.
